outcome: Payment Manager app live: cross-portfolio refunds + runtime provider switching
why: Refunding requires accessing a buried page inside Caryina only; switching payment processors requires redeploying the entire app; no cross-shop payment visibility exists.
outcome_statement: A standalone payment management app (apps/payment-manager/) is live on Cloudflare Workers: per-shop processor selection switchable at runtime via UI, cross-portfolio order list with refund issuance, and the Caryina admin refund route migrated to a proxy. Caryina's Node.js Axerve execution path is retained as a backend service.
